low.cleaned: Fix spacing and typography in Hero component to use design tokens. Replace hardcoded colors (bg-blue-600 → bg-surface-primary, text-white → text-content-inverse) and spacing (p-6 → p-section-padding, mt-8 → mt-section-gap). Maintain WCAG AA contrast.
Align footer links according to design token spacing and colors. Use spacing.section.* for layout and color.text-content-secondary for link colors.
Add proper focus states to all primary buttons. Use focus:ring-2 with color.interactive.focus token. Ensure 44px minimum touch target.

medium.cleaned: Make homepage mobile responsive using Tailwind breakpoints and design tokens. Base styles = mobile, enhance with md: and lg: breakpoints. Ensure typography and spacing follow token system.
Ensure navigation bar is fully accessible with keyboard navigation and ARIA labels. Add aria-label to icon-only buttons, ensure focus order is logical, use skip-links component.
Add form validation to contact page. Show real-time validation messages, use design tokens for error colors (color-error), ensure proper ARIA live regions for screen readers.
Implement dark mode toggle in navigation. Use existing ThemeContext, ensure all colors use theme-aware tokens (--fg, --bg), persist preference in localStorage.

high.cleaned: Refactor FilterSystem and FilterBar components: merge duplicated code, enforce token usage, add accessibility labels, maintain TypeScript strict compliance, update all dependent pages. No new files - modify existing only.
Optimize restaurant detail page for performance: reduce bundle size, lazy-load images using next/image, enforce design token consistency, maintain strict typing. Target: < 100KB initial bundle.

Implement authentication flow with Supabase: add login/register forms, OAuth social login, session management, protected routes, error handling. Use existing Supabase client, enforce design tokens, maintain TypeScript strict.
